purpose: Motion presets for qiaomu-ppt formal HTML decks. Use these as execution contracts, not as visual decorations.

levels.label: No Authored Motion
levels.required_fallback: the visible slide is already the final static state

levels.label: Subtle Reading Path
levels.required_fallback: all text and proof objects are readable without playback

levels.label: Expressive Timeline
levels.required_fallback: final static state plus reduced-motion branch

levels.label: Cinematic HTML-First
levels.required_fallback: poster or final readable state; editable PPTX parity is not guaranteed

gsap.role: Timeline choreography for DOM/SVG/CSS slide elements.
rules: Prefer timeline labels over chained delays.
Animate transform and opacity before layout properties.
Reset state when jumping between slides.

lottie-web.role: Browser playback for After Effects JSON exported through Bodymovin.
rules: Set autoplay false for deterministic review.
Set loop false unless a finite ambient loop is explicitly justified.
Declare poster or static fallback for cinematic use.
Declare fallback poster for cinematic use.

validation.browser_review: Required for final/professional motion decks; record screenshots or clips and console error status.
